steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a Text Structure and Purpose question. The task is to identify the overall structure of the passage — meaning how the two parts of the text relate to each other and what organizational pattern holds them together.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — It explains how one cultural institution was founded, then explains its plans to expand further.: The passage never mentions any plans for expansion. The Museo is described by its founding year and collection size, and the passage moves on to a second institution entirely. ✗
  • Choice B — It describes a trend among cultural institutions in the United States, then identifies an institution that rejects that trend.: The passage describes no trend and no rejection. It simply presents two institutions without any contrast of that kind. ✗
  • Choice C — It defines a certain type of cultural institution, then argues that this type of institution decisively influences society.: The passage makes no definitions and offers no social argument. It is purely descriptive. ✗
  • Choice D — It discusses one cultural institution, then discusses a more recently founded cultural institution.: The first paragraph describes the Museo de Las Americas (founded 1991); the phrase “More recently founded” then introduces the Latino Cultural Center. The structure is exactly two institutions presented in chronological order. ✓
D is correct.
